title: Mouthwatering French Pancetta Stir-fry
description: A winey and crumbly post-workout French dish featuring pancetta and stir-fry, this recipe is FODMAP-friendly and perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Heat the garlic-infused oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the diced pancetta and cook until crispy
Remove the pancetta from the skillet and set aside
Add the sliced red bell pepper and onion to the skillet and cook until tender
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown
Add the dry white wine to the skillet and cook until the liquid is almost completely evaporated
Return the cooked pancetta to the skillet and stir to combine
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Serve hot over rice or noodles
